description: Cross-platform MCP server for managing long-lived background processes from any MCP client
name: io.github.lsequeiraa/mcp-sidecar

environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of concurrent managed processes (default: 10)
environmentVariables.name: SIDECAR_MAX_PROCESSES

environmentVariables.description: Output buffer size per stream in bytes (default: 1048576)
environmentVariables.name: SIDECAR_BUFFER_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: Milliseconds to wait between graceful and forced termination (default: 5000)
environmentVariables.name: SIDECAR_KILL_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Seconds before exited processes are auto-removed. 0 disables cleanup (default: 1800)
environmentVariables.name: SIDECAR_CLEANUP_AFTER

environmentVariables.description: Global cap on bytes returned by the output tool. 0 means unlimited (default: 0)
environmentVariables.name: SIDECAR_MAX_OUTPUT_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of executable names. When set, enables security mode with direct exec (no shell). Unset means security disabled.
environmentVariables.name: SIDECAR_ALLOWED_EXECUTABLES

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated regex patterns to reject in commands. Only applies when security is enabled.
environmentVariables.name: SIDECAR_BLOCKED_PATTERNS

environmentVariables.description: Audit log destination. 'true' writes to cwd, 'temp' writes to OS temp dir, or a directory path. Unset disables audit logging.
environmentVariables.name: SIDECAR_AUDIT_LOG

title: MCP Sidecar
